Financial Results As on 30th June 2026 |SUBJECT: Outcome of Board Meeting

Significant increase in volume has been observed in BF Utilities Limited. The Exchange, in order to ensure that investors have latest relevant information about the company and to inform the market place so that the interest of the investors is safeguarded, had written to the company. BF Utilities Limited has submitted their response. |SUBJECT: Spurt in Volume
